title: Size bins — w
text: w() returns vector sizes start size bin consumer spectrum. w_full() returns vector sizes start size bin resource spectrum, typically starts smaller sizes consumer spectrum. dw() returns vector widths size bins consumer spectrum. dw_full() returns vector widths size bins resource spectrum.

title: Size bins — w
text: represent continuous size spectrum computer, size variable discretized vector w discrete weights, providing grid sizes spanning range smallest egg size largest maximum size. grid values divide full size range finite number size bins. size bins chosen small enough avoid discretisation errors becoming big. can fetch vector w() vector bin widths dw(). weight grid set logarithmically spaced, w[j]=w[1]*10^(j*dx) fixed dx. means bin widths increase size: dw[j] = w[j] * (10^dx - 1). grid set automatically creating MizerParams object. resource spectrum spans larger range sizes, sizes discretized different vector weights w_full. usually starts much smaller size w, also runs largest size, last entries w_full coincide entries w. logarithmic spacing w_full w, w_full[j]=w_full[1]*10^(j*dx). function w_full() gives vector sizes dw_full() gives vector bin widths. need vectors converting number densities numbers. example size spectrum species stored vector values represent density fish size bin rather number fish. number fish size bin w[j] w[j+1]=w[j]+dw[j] obtained N[j]*dw[j]. vector w can used example convert number individuals size bin biomass size bin. biomass jth bin biomass[j] = N[j] * dw[j] * w[j]. course calculations discrete sizes size bins giving approximations continuous values, approximations get better smaller size bins , .e., size bins used. However using size bins also slows calculations, trade-. functions setting MizerParams objects allow choose number size bins no_w.

title: Size bins — w
code: str(w(NS_params)) #>  num [1:100] 0.001 0.00119 0.00142 0.0017 0.00203 ... str(dw(NS_params)) #>  num [1:100] 0.000193 0.000231 0.000275 0.000329 0.000392 ... str(w_full(NS_params)) #>  num [1:226] 2.12e-13 2.53e-13 3.02e-13 3.61e-13 4.30e-13 ... str(dw_full(NS_params)) #>  num [1:226] 4.10e-14 4.90e-14 5.84e-14 6.97e-14 8.32e-14 ...  # Calculating the biomass of Cod in each bin in the North Sea model biomass <- initialN(NS_params)["Cod", ] * dw(NS_params) * w(NS_params) # Summing to get total biomass sum(biomass) #> [1] 601591842546

title: Development version (will become mizer 3.0.0)
text: setRateFunction() now works correctly even extension package loaded S3 dispatch active. Previously, custom rate functions registered via setRateFunction() silently ignored whenever usesExtensionDispatch() returned TRUE. fix resolves functions call time-step loop (projectRateFunctions()), per-step overhead. setResource() now allows resource_level = 1. balancing otherwise divide zero resource capacity equals current resource abundance positive consumption, capacity increased slightly warning instead failing early. Bug fix: getFMort() MizerSim object silently dropping component names n_other passing rate function dependencies (getEGrowth(), getPredMort()). caused failures whenever rate functions accessed n_other component name (e.g. n_other[["resource"]]). internal implementation also refactored use plyr::aaply pattern getFeedingLevel() getPredMort(), keeping three methods consistent. Added first-stage infrastructure composable extension chains: registerExtensions(), getRegisteredExtensions(), coerceToExtensionClass(). Extension classes marker classes S3 dispatch, MizerSim deriving extension chain sim@params@extensions. saveParams() now serialises extension objects plain MizerParams objects preserving extension chain, readParams() restores appropriate extension class. New saveSim() readSim() helpers provide lifecycle MizerSim objects. Added projectRates() projectEncounter() first S3 hooks extension-chain rate pipeline. Extension-aware projections dispatch projectRates(), models without extensions keep using pre-resolved mizerRates() pipeline directly. Added S3 projection hooks remaining standard mizer rate functions. Extension-aware projections now call projectFeedingLevel(), projectEReproAndGrowth(), projectERepro(), projectEGrowth(), projectDiffusion(), projectPredRate(), projectPredMort(), projectFMort(), projectMort(), projectRDI() projectRDD() projectResourceMort() directly. Extensions provide marker class now remain metadata-trigger S3 projection-rate dispatch path. New scaleRates(params, factor) function rescales rates model given factor. equivalent time rescaling: speeds slows dynamics without affecting steady state. rate slots (search_vol, intake_max, metab, mu_b, ext_encounter, ext_diffusion, catchability, rr_pp) associated species parameters (gamma, h, ks, k, z0, z_ext, z0pre, E_ext, D_ext, R_max) rescaled consistently. MizerParams gains use_predation_diffusion slot (logical, default FALSE). FALSE (default), [mizerDiffusion()] omits predation-induced diffusion term, preserving behaviour previous mizer versions. Set TRUE enable jump-growth diffusion term. diffusion() / diffusion<-() / setDiffusion() renamed ext_diffusion() / ext_diffusion<-() / setExtDiffusion() follow naming convention setExtMort() setExtEncounter(). MizerSim accessors defined R/MizerSim-class.R (validSim(), N(), NResource(), finalN(), finalNResource(), idxFinalT(), getTimes(), getEffort(), getParams()) now registered S3 generics MizerSim methods, aligning rest package dispatch model making extension-specific methods possible. setComponent() now accepts optional colour linetype arguments applies via setColours() setLinetypes() added components can styled directly plots. New “Extending mizer” vignette (vignette("extending-mizer")) documents use setRateFunction(), setComponent(), customFunction(), summarises required signatures return shapes custom rate functions, gives worked examples custom encounter function added ecosystem component. New “Cheatsheet: Analysis Plotting” vignette (vignette("cheatsheet")) provides quick reference functions access simulation arrays, compute summaries, calculate indicators, create plots. Closes #176. compareParams() output now printed human-readable format, difference block separated blank lines. array slots differ, max absolute difference shown per species. slots differ comment attributes, comments displayed. Closes #205. animateSpectra() gains background argument (default TRUE) include background species animation, consistent plotSpectra(). background species shown separate grey line grouped single “Background” legend entry. setRateFunction() now validates registered function calling test inputs checking return value correct dimensions. catches mismatched custom rate functions registration time rather simulation run. Closes #167. New species parameters z_ext (default 0) d (default n - 1) add optional power-law term external mortality: mu_ext(w) = z0 + z_ext *   w^d. z_ext zero (default) behaviour unchanged. Closes #329. New species parameter E_ext (default 0) sets coefficient external encounter rate power law. setExtEncounter() now calculates default external encounter rate E_ext * w^n custom array supplied, matching pattern setMaxIntakeRate(). reset argument also added setExtEncounter() force recalculation species parameters. indicator functions getProportionOfLargeFish(), getMeanWeight(), getMeanMaxWeight(), getCommunitySlope() now also accept MizerParams object return single value (named vector getMeanMaxWeight() measure = "") calculated initial abundances. Closes #262. addSpecies() now accepts info_level argument (default 3) control verbosity information messages, consistent newMultispeciesParams(). Set info_level = 0 suppress messages. Closes #290. summary() MizerParams MizerSim now displays metadata @metadata slot, including title, description, authors, DOI, URL, mizer version, creation/modification timestamps (set). New ArraySpeciesBySize S3 class species x size arrays returned many mizer functions getEncounter(), getFeedingLevel(), getMaxIntakeRate(), getMetabolicRate(), getSearchVolume(), getExtMort(), getExtEncounter(), getMaturityProportion(), getReproductionProportion(), diffusion(), finalN(), initialN(), get_initial_n(). ArraySpeciesBySize object behaves like regular matrix arithmetic subsetting, carries human-readable value_name units attribute provides enhanced print(), summary(), plot(), .data.frame() methods. New ArraySpeciesByTime S3 class time x species arrays returned getBiomass(), getSSB(), getN(), getYield() called MizerSim object. Like ArraySpeciesBySize, carries value_name units attributes provides enhanced print(), summary(), plot(), .data.frame() methods. New ggplotly() methods ArraySpeciesBySize ArraySpeciesByTime convert ggplot2 output plot() interactive plotly figure via plotly::ggplotly(). plot() method ArraySpeciesBySize gains log_y, wlim, ylim arguments controlling y-axis scale axis limits. plot() method ArraySpeciesByTime gains log ylim arguments. New getTrophicLevel() function returns matrix (species × size) trophic level individuals size, accounting ontogenetic diet shifts integrating consumption-weighted average prey trophic level individual’s growth trajectory. New getTrophicLevelBySpecies() returns consumption-rate-weighted mean trophic level per species. functions accept MizerParams MizerSim objects. Closes #307. plot() summary() methods MizerParams, MizerSim, ArraySpeciesBySize objects now registered S3 methods rather S4 methods. means plot() summary() remain plain S3 generics mizer loaded, avoiding interference S4 method dispatch packages. New expandSizeGrid() function expands size grid MizerParams object new minimum /maximum size preserving existing species data. Added info_level argument projectToSteady(), steady(), setParams(), newCommunityParams(), newTraitParams(), matchBiomasses(), matchNumbers(), matchYields(). Setting info_level = 0 suppresses informational messages; info_level = 3 (default) shows messages. t_max t_save arguments project() now respected even effort array supplied. t_max provided, simulation extends beyond times effort array using last known effort values. t_save provided, controls save frequency effort values interpolated needed. allows users extend simulations without specifying dummy effort values final time period (#231). numerical scheme now supports diffusion McKendrick-von Foerster equation, allowing individual variability growth modelled. new diffusion slot MizerParams holds diffusion coefficient (species x size). Use setExtDiffusion() / ext_diffusion() / ext_diffusion<-() set retrieve . New getFlux() function calculates flux individuals entering size class, combining advective flux somatic growth diffusive flux. getRequiredRDD() now exported. calculates recruitment rate needed maintain given initial abundance, accounting growth diffusion. steadySingleSpecies() now correctly preserves steady state project(), including diffusion non-zero. Growth now forced always non-negative, preventing unphysical shrinkage. warning issued growth stops maturity size. New vignettes: cohort dynamics demonstrating effect diffusion single-species model; numerical details documenting finite-volume scheme steady-state solution; vignette using FFT predation kernel calculations. Many functions now S3 methods can called either MizerParams MizerSim object users define subclasses methods modify mizer behaviour (#330). getBiomass() now use_cutoff argument restrict biomass calculation sizes biomass_cutoff species parameter. plotBiomass() plotlyBiomass() now use_cutoff argument, passed getBiomass(). age_mat_vB() now exported. project_n() new exported function projects abundance spectrum forward time, factored project().

title: Development version (will become mizer 3.0.0)
text: getMeanMaxWeight() now correctly applies species selector denominator. upgradeParams() now preserves MizerParams subclasses extra slots upgrading older objects. plotDataFrame() now correctly applies custom log-scale x breaks. get_size_range_array() longer gives error size brackets selected.

title: mizer 2.5.4
text: CRAN release: 2025-11-16 New function renameGear() rename gears MizerParams object, similar renameSpecies(). addSpecies() now proceeds warning instead error species growth stops maturity (#315). matchBiomasses() matchNumbers() now provide informative error messages. plotDiet() now restricts plot size ranges meaningful biomass density (#317). wlim ylim arguments plotting functions now set actual axis limits instead just zooming (#320). legend plotlyFeedingLevel() improved critical feeding level included. species gears columns now never factors, longer need call .character() often. validParams() also calls validGearParams(). validParams() checks w_min valid species increases necessary. validSpeciesParams() now also sets default p equal n. species_params<-() given_species_params<-() now check species names match. params argument l2w() w2l() renamed species_params follow mizer’s convention params refers MizerParams object.

title: mizer 2.5.4
text: animateSpectra() now uses consistent colours preserves colour identity across frames (#321). getReproductionProportion() longer returns incorrect proportions > 1 (#299) setResource() now correctly applies w_pp_cutoff parameter carrying capacity initial resource abundance changed without providing resource_capacity(#306). Predation kernels now truncated documented. given_species_params() longer makes unwanted changes species parameters. steadySingleSpecies() longer changes time_modified.

title: mizer 2.5.3
text: CRAN release: 2024-10-17 patch update users changed w_max manually model get unhelpful error messages trying use model new version. General checking parameters made robust. particular validSpeciesParams() extra checks consistency species parameters validParams() checks rate arrays contain finite numeric values validSim() checks simulation results finite truncates simulation .

title: mizer 2.5.2
text: CRAN release: 2024-10-14 Fixed bug led newCommunityParams() set resource parameters differently since version 2.4.0 (#293) addSpecies() now correctly preserves species_params existing model. addSpecies() longer requires new species grow maximum size, maturity size required. Now validGivenSpeciesParams() validates given species parameters without adding defaults validSpeciesParams() validates returns completed species parameter dataframe. New species parameter w_repro_max giving size species invests 100% energy reproduction. Set w_max default. removeSpecies() now also removes species parameters set remaining species. Changing w_max now also correctly updates ft_mask (#296). compareParams() now also spells differences given species parameters. getDiet() now also includes contribution external encounter rate diet. setPredKernel() now throws error required predation kernel parameters NA. plotYieldGear() one can select subset gears new gears argument. New helper function valid_gears_arg() check gears argument functions take gears argument. Improved scaling y-axis plotGrowthCurves(). steadySingleSpecies() longer requires species grow w_max. matchGrowth() now also rescales external encounter rate. setExtEncounter() longer resets external encounter rate zero called without ext_encounter argument. function plotBiomassObservedVsModel() now plots ratio modelled observed biomass default (ratio = T), useful visually see far modelled biomass observed biomass. time_modified field now updated correctly steadySingleSpecies(), setColours() setLinetypes(). Deprecated matchYields() calibrateYield(). Improved unit tests. improvements documentation.

title: mizer 2.5.1
text: CRAN release: 2024-03-08 patch release made necessary change CRAN’s requirement regarding vignettes. also includes bug fix: project() projectToSteady(..., return_sim = TRUE) now correctly returns also components MizerSim object stored n_other. #285

title: mizer 2.5.0
text: CRAN release: 2023-12-08 release introduces change requires upgrade old MizerParams MizerSim objects upgradeParams() upgradeSim().

title: mizer 2.5.0
text: Now model can include external encounter rate represents rate predator encounters food explicitly modelled. encounter rate set setExtEncounter() ext_encounter<-() can read getExtEncounter() ext_encounter(). similar external mortality handled.

title: mizer 2.5.0
text: can now use given_species_params() see species parameter values explicitly specified calculated_species_params() see species parameter values mizer calculated automatically set defaults. can continue use species_params() get species parameters, irrespective whether given calculated. can still set parameter values species_params<-(), can also use stronger given_species_params<-() sets values give also triggers re-calculation calculated species parameters. Using given_species_params<-() therefore usually better option.

title: mizer 2.5.0
text: now three-part mizer course https://mizer.course.sizespectrum.org part consisting several tutorials, including code exercises: Part 1: Understand gain understanding size spectra dynamics exploring simple example systems hands-mizer. Part 2: Build build multi-species mizer model Celtic sea, following example. can also create model area interest. Part 3: Use explore effects changes fishing changes resource dynamics fish community fisheries yield. run model scenarios.

Frequent warnings avoided length-based weight-based parameters given inconsistent. #277 Documentation effort argument project() improved. error message given predation kernel returns negative values everywhere zero. #283

what: Avoid confusion between maximum size and von Bertalanffy asymptotic size
title: mizer 2.4.0
text: explanation see blog post https://blog.mizer.sizespectrum.org/posts/2022-11-30-dont-use-von-bertalanffy-growth-parameters/ species parameter specifies size also largest fish stop growing renamed w_inf w_max. parameter w_inf now reserved von Bertalanffy asymptotic size parameter. upgrade existing MizerParams object upgradeParams() w_inf column copied w_max column automatically, may want change values currently reflect maximum size species. Otherwise size distributions predicted mizer match observations.

what: Set resource abundance rather than carrying capacity
title: mizer 2.4.0
text: resource parameters kappa lambda now used set abundance resource steady state rather carrying capacity, latter observable. tuning steady state using steady() function resource abundance now kept fixed chosen value. resource dynamics can switched later setResource() without changing steady state. stage choose either resource intrinsic growth rate resource carrying capacity determined setResource() way resource replenishes rate consumed. want keep old behaviour switch automatic balancing add balance = FALSE argument calling setResource(). can also choose semichemostat dynamics resource_semichemostat() logistic dynamics resource_logistic() can write function implementing sophisticated resource dynamics. setParams() function longer includes arguments setting resource parameters. Instead set separately setResource().

title: mizer 2.4.0
text: explained blog post https://blog.mizer.sizespectrum.org/posts/2022-11-30-dont-use-von-bertalanffy-growth-parameters/, von Bertalanffy curves fitted size--age data suitable estimating size-dependent growth rates mizer. therefore now recommended instead von Bertalanffy parameters supply age maturity age_mat column species parameter data frame. used mizer calculate default maximum intake rate parameter h supply . past, whenever changed model parameters, needed re-tune parameters keep growth rates line observations. now new function matchGrowth() automatically scales search volume, maximum consumption rate metabolic rate factor order achieve growth rate allows individuals reach maturity size maturity age keeping feeding level critical feeding level unchanged. function however preserve steady state, need also call steady() matching growth rates.

title: mizer 2.4.0
text: New function steadySingleSpecies() balances size-spectrum dynamics ignoring multi-species effects. words, calculates steady-state size spectrum species abundance prey predators kept constant current values. plotGrowthCurves() can now superimpose scatterplot size--age data supply via new size_at_age argument. New functions calibrateNumber() matchNumbers() like calibrateBiomass() matchBiomasses() work observed numbers instead observed biomasses. New function age_mat() calculate age maturity growth rate size maturity. effort vector effort array contains NA’s, now replaced default effort value. #230 entries interaction matrix interaction_resource longer restricted less equal 1. #232 user supplies row names interaction matrix gives column names column names also used row names. #247 project() now also works called MizerSim object additional components. steady() now preserves RDD function MizerParams object rather always setting “BevertonHoltRDD”. averaging abundances time plotSpectra() setInitialValues() user can now choose geometric averaging geometric_mean = TRUE. w_mat25 species parameter longer filled automatically supplied. makes easier change w_mat without change w_mat25 time. compareParams() now also checks validity second argument. Hide printing messages chosen defaults newTraitParams(). Higher values info_level argument newMultispeciesParams() now leads messages. Giving helpful messages validSpeciesParams(). #136 New helper functions l2w() w2l() converting length-based weight-based species parameters. #258 Check assessor functions MizerSim slots called MizerSim object. Add style argument plotDataFrame() facilitate producing area plots. Add wrap_scale argument plotDataFrame() control scaling axes faceted plots. plotDiet() can now show diets several predator species faceted plot. #267 Change size linewidth aesthetic avoid warnings new version ggplot2. Better error message functions called valid species selected. #251 differences compareParams() says clearly. getReproductionLevel() works long R_max set. #252 Converted several unit tests edition 3 testthat package. Improved documentation gear_params(). Improved defaults can now implemented keeping backwards compatibility via defaults_edition(). #186 New defaults edition 2: catchability = 0.3 instead 1, initial effort = 1 instead 0. #243 defaults edition 2, get_gamma_default() ensures feeding level f0 larvae also interaction_resource equal 1. #238 Set default linecolour linetype external mortality.

title: mizer 2.4.0
text: Restored line colours NS_params Comment field now preserved set_species_default(). #268 Comment w_inf longer leads error plyr::aaply(). #269 Can now set url field metadata. Correct species now listed legend plotYieldObservedVsModel() plotBiomassObservedVsModel(). #266 Standard order legend plotDiet() restored change ggplot2 package. #265 Fix handling column names interaction matrix read .csv file. #263

title: mizer 2.3.1
text: CRAN release: 2022-07-06 Resolved conflict mizerPredRate() argument t function base::t(). Assert upgradeParams() must called MizerParams object upgradeSim() MizerSim object. Errors changed warnings getRequiredRDD() renameSpecies() longer fails linecolour linetype different lengths. matchYields() now also works model single species. setInitialValues() can now average time_range. getSSB(), getBiomass(), getN(), getYieldGear() getYield() can now called MizerParams object well MizerSim object. (#200) Updated shiny app inst/shiny/selectivity_effects current mizer version.

title: mizer 2.3.0
text: CRAN release: 2021-09-11

title: mizer 2.3.0
text: New plots plotBiomassObservedVsModel() plotYieldObservedVsModel() contributed @SamikDatta., together plotly counterparts. New calibrateBiomass(), calibrateYield() set model scale agree total observed biomass total observed yield. Uses new scaleModel(). New matchBiomasses() matchYields() try adjust abundances species produce observed biomasses yields. See blog post https://bit.ly/2YqXESV . now accessor replacement functions rates. example instead params <- setReproduction(params, maturity = my_maturity) one can simply use maturity(params) <- my_maturity. documented together setter functions. #213 New setMetadata() add information MizerParams object describing model, example title, description, author list authors, url doi. particularly useful sharing models others New saveParams() saving MizerParams object file readParams() reading back . resulting files can shared others want run model. MizerParams object now registers mizer version model last saved. model working expected current version mizer, can go back older version presumably working. helps reproducibility research. MizerParams object registers time created time last modified. See getMetadata(). helps keep track different versions model. steady() now preserve argument possible values erepro, R_max reproduction_level specify quantity preserve. means one can continue use steady() also one started tune density dependence reproduction. #208 website now using nice new mizer logo designed Kira Askaroff (www.kiraaskaroff.com) new mizer extension package mizerMR allowing include multiple resource spectra model.

title: mizer 2.3.0
text: rownames gear_params now set “species, gear”, one can access individual entries example gear_params(NS_params)["Cod, Otter", "catchability"]. #212 z0 argument setExtMort() deprecated favour ext_mort order avoid confusion species parameter z0. setColours() setLinetypes() now issue warnings invalid values given ignores NAs. experimental comment arguments setter functions removed. #214 setter functions new reset argument , set TRUE recalculate rates species_, gear_ resource_params even custom values set. #214 species argument various functions, checked valid_species_arg(), now throw error even valid species included. warning issued. means example plotSpectra(NS_params, species = list(), total = TRUE) now allowed. getComponent() mizer extension mechanism now returns NULL asked non-existent component instead giving error. gives easy way check existence component. example interaction matrix inter North Sea model now alternative name NS_interaction, old name deprecated. Species added addSpecies() now default given reproduction level 1/4 instead 0, low densities introduced otherwise enough density dependence stabilise . size range arguments min_w, max_w, min_l max_l used summary functions processed get_size_range_array() accept vector values setting different limits different species. resource dynamics function now also passed resource_rate resource_capacity arguments, makes easier use extension packages. Species names now always coerced strings, even user gives numbers. #202 new system informing user defaults set newMultispeciesParams(), #199 Many improvements documentation. Many small improvements code quality testing. Better social media cards, especially twitter. mizer can run binder

title: mizer 2.3.0
text: Changing linecolour linetype species parameters now actually changes linecolours linetypes intended. Growth curves calculated getGrowthCurves() plotted plotGrowthCurves() now correct, longer extend asymptotic size. plotGrowthCurves() species_panel = TRUE now respects species argument show growth curves selected species, works MizerParams object well MizerSim object, shows panels correct order. #201 Reinstated example .csv files missing package vignettes longer included.

title: mizer 2.2.1
text: CRAN release: 2021-08-03

title: mizer 2.2.1
text: setBevertonHolt() function expanded arguments. allows change density dependence reproduction without changing steady state model. new getReproductionLevel() function tells proportion maximum reproduction rate species operating model. package now comes example MizerSim object NS_sim holds simulation North Sea model. New function plotDataFrame() allows easier creation plots.

title: mizer 2.2.1
text: setInitialValues() correctly preserves gear names initial effort. Thanks Axel Rossberg. getFMort() correctly passes t argument custom fishing mortality function may written. legends plots now show species actually included plot.

title: mizer 2.2.1
text: Speed improvement mizerPredMort() suggested Axel Rossberg. plotSpectra() now shows species legend actually contained plot. Updated tests plots use new version vdiffr package. improvements examples help pages. functions thorough tests arguments give useful error messages. initialNOther() also works MizerSim object. projectToSteady() called effort, effort now also stored initial_effort slot. Improvement summary() now using sprintf() better formatting also gives initial_effort. Improved documentation size grid bins. arguments project_simple() given convenient defaults. tooltips plotly plots cleaned bit. Species names now always coerced strings, even user supplies numeric names. Update “Multi-Species Model North Sea” tutorial use projectToSteady().

title: mizer 2.2.0
text: CRAN release: 2021-06-24

title: mizer 2.2.0
text: New function newSingleSpeciesParams() creating single species power-law background. New function animateSpectra() creating animated plot simulation. New functions addSpecies(), removeSpecies() renameSpecies(). parameters ecosystem component added setComponent() can now take form, longer named list. New argument return_data plot’s functions allows return data frame used ggplot instead plot.

title: mizer 2.2.0
text: steady() longer switches Beverton-Holt density dependence. can manually setBevertonHolt() R_factor = Inf.

title: mizer 2.2.0
text: getYield() now also works density-dependent fishing mortality. Thanks James Roger discovering problem. gamma argument now longer ignored newTraitParams() correctly overrides f0 argument. #188 getFMort() works correctly called MizerSim object. resource_semichemostat() longer fail sizes resource growth rate resource mortality rate zero. default no_w newTraitParams() now always integer. Problems different machine precision longer prompts error “w_min_idx point start size bin containing egg size w_min”. `addSpecies() longer extends grid due rounding errors. valid_species_arg() called species = NULL background species returns NULL.

title: mizer 2.2.0
text: New tutorial single-species sizes-spectrum dynamics. Improved documentation getDiet() plotDiet(). info units added documentation summary functions.

title: mizer 2.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2021-03-21

title: mizer 2.1.0
text: New function projectToSteady() run full dynamics steady state. New functions distanceSSLogN() distanceMaxRelRDI() measure distance two states. New function compareParams() compare two MizerParams objects. Added constantEggRDI() allow keeping egg densities fixed. setting custom parameter arrays setter functions, now easy user document via “comment” arguments. #177 New function customFunction() allow users overwrite mizer functions. Now effort specified named vector giving values gears, effort remaining gears assumed zero. Added possibility see output plotGrowthCurves panel species respective Von Bertalanffy curves

title: mizer 2.1.0
text: default, functions plotPredMort() plotFMort stop displaying mortality values past species’ asymptotic size. argumentall.sizes allows continue show values.

title: mizer 2.1.0
text: getFMort() now passes time argument correctly. #181 validEffortArray() now sets dimnames correctly. #173

title: mizer 2.1.0
text: Using lifecycle package indicate status functions arguments ‘experimental’ ‘deprecated’. Improved error handling setFishing(). #172 Made use vdiffr conditional, required §1.1.3.1 ‘Writing R Extensions’. Consistent handling species argument mizer functions, via new valid_species_arg() function. #170 tests. Test coverage now 94.71% Improved argument checking setInitialValues() Throwing error min_w_pp larger min_w Improved documentation functions getting fishing mortality.

title: mizer 2.0.4
text: CRAN release: 2020-08-30

title: mizer 2.0.4
text: value t passed dynamics functions corrected. setReproduction() now correctly sets total proportion psi maturity proportion changed.

title: mizer 2.0.4
text: way times set project() simplified. now either set arguments t_start, t_max t_save dimension names effort array. Renamed setRmax() setBevertonHolt() allow work arbitrary MizerParams object. old name setRmax() still available alias. mizerFMort() now can also use abundances rates e_growth pred_mort. useful example implementing balanced harvesting. calculation numeric scheme simplified. gear_params allowed zero rows. validGearParams() species name used gear name case gear_name NA. validGearParams() ensures required arguments selectivity function supplied checks validity species names. species_params()<- suppresses warnings. steady() fails RDI zero gives meaningful error message. newCommunityParams() now protects zero investment reproduction comment. default maturity ogive truncated proportions smaller 1e-8. new helper function valid_species_arg() checks validity species selection arguments. upgradeParams() can now also upgrade old MizerParams objects consistent initial_effort. new helper function validParams() validates MizerParams object automatically upgrades upgradeParams() necessary. Old MizerParams objects updated automatically used plot functions, rate functions, summary functions project() steady(), #163. New function getRates() calculates rates collects list. steady() return_sim = TRUE now creates MizerSim object way project(), namely original values first time slot. Added documentation species_params(), gear_params() resource_params(). Numerous small improvements documentation.

title: mizer 2.0.3

title: mizer 2.0.3
text: Correct handling shiny progress bar project().

title: mizer 2.0.3
text: Consistently passing time argument rate functions. allow extensions implement time-dependent rates. Passing growth mortality rate RDI function. Simplified getRates() functions removing arguments passed rates. Instead required rates now always calculated within functions. Improved documentation rate functions register rate functions. validGearParams() handle NAs gracefully check duplicates. Updated hake-mullet selectivity demonstration shiny app. Improved user documentation several places.

title: mizer 2.0.2

title: mizer 2.0.2
text: Time passed rate functions now actual simulation time, time elapsed since start simulation. upgradeParams() works also params objects created development version mizer. upgrading older params object, upgradeParams() better job guessing value w_pp_cutoff. getFeedingLevel(), getPredMort(), setInitialValues() steady() now work also model extra components. critical feeding level lines now mentioned legend plotFeedinglevel() called include_critical = TRUE, see #162. Avoid annoying warnings dplyr package species_params tibble.

title: mizer 2.0.2
text: Renamed functions params(), effort() times() getParams(), getEffort() getTimes() avoid conflicts.

title: mizer 2.0.2
text: improvements documentation. unit tests. Uses less memory time step small creating array effort values time step. getDiet() also takes account possible contributions user-defined components. extension mechanism, now name component also passed functions implementing dynamics, encounter mortality. project() called t_max < t_save t_save automatically reduced result t_max get saved. Start showing progress bar earlier project(). New helper function project_simple() projects given number time steps. might useful extension writers. ... argument project() passed dynamics rate functions. steady() runs faster using project_simple(). Documentation mizer website now search bar.

title: mizer 2.0.1

title: mizer 2.0.1
text: summary() now also works non-default feeding kernels. #159 validSpeciesParams() longer fails w_mat25 specified. #160 setInitialValues() also works model single species. #161 resource_params()<- now works unit tests.

text: inconsistencies choice names parameters removed renaming interaction_p -> interaction_resource r_resource -> resource_rate K_resource -> resource_capacity

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: CRAN release: 2020-04-04 major new release many new features, internal refactoring code new extension mechanism.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Nevertheless version mizer almost fully backwards compatible version 1.0 exception bug fixes following breaking changes: previous version mizer inconsistently truncated lognormal predation kernel calculating predation calculating encounter. new version never truncates. leads small differences simulation results. Removed print_it argument plot functions. plotFeedingLevel() now plots values within size range species. reason want old plots show feeding level also sizes fish can never , need supply argument .sizes = TRUE. way density-dependence reproduction rate set changed, see RDD argument setReproduction(). sex_ratio argument removed getRDI() getRDD(). set_scaling_model() function removed models can now set newTraitParams() options perfect_scaling = TRUE egg_size_scaling = TRUE. functions display_frames(), addSpecies(), setBackground() retuneAbundance() removed “mizerExperimental” package (https://sizespectrum.org/mizerExperimental/) runs project() progress bar displayed default. can turn option `progress_bar = FALSE. Throughout mizer term “plankton” replaced “resource”, affects labelling resource spectrum plots.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: new functions newCommunityParams() newTraitParams() newMultispeciesParams() replace old functions set_community_model(), set_trait_model() MizerParams(), now deprecated. new functions choose better default values, particular metabolic rate maximum intake rate.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: setting mizer model, possible change specific model parameters new functions species_params<-() resource_params<-() gear_params<-() setPredKernel() setSearchVolume() setInteraction() setMaxIntakeRate() setMetabolicRate() setExtMort() setReproduction() setFishing() setResource() new function setParams() wrapper functions also used setting new model newMultispeciesParams(). (#51) documentation functions serves explain details mizer model. Along setter functions accessor functions getting parameter arrays: getPredKernel(), getSearchVolume(), getInteraction(), getMaxIntakeRate(), getMetabolicRate(), getExtMort(), getMaturityProportion(), getReproductionProportion(), getCatchability(), getSelectivity(), getResourceRate(), getResourceCapacity(), getResourceParams(), getResourceDynamics(), Setting maximum reproduction rate separated new function setRmax().

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: MizerParams object now also contains initial values size spectra. particularly useful model tuned produce observed steady state. new function steady() finds steady state model sets initial value. initial values can accessed changed via functions initialN() initialNResource(). initial values can set final values previous simulation setInitialValues(). MizerParams object now slot initial_effort specifies initial fishing effort steady state calibrated.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Mizer now extension mechanism allows R packages written generalise mizer model. See setRateFunction() setComponent(). mechanism still experimental may change gain experience writing extensions mizer.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Every plot function now plotly version makes plot interactive using plotly package. example plotlyBiomass() plotly version plotBiomass(), . New plotGrowthCurves() plots growth curves compares von Bertalanffy growth curve. New plotDiet() plots diet composition function predator size. New highlight argument plot functions display curves multiple species. Displays highlighted species wider lines. legends plots species now consistently ordered way species parameter data frame. plot functions time-resolved now accept also MizerParams object alternative MizerSim object plot initial state. New plot() method MizerParams object plot initial state. Avoiding duplicate graphs R Markdown documents. New argument include_critical plotFeedingLevel() allows show also critical feeding level. New wlim argument plotSpectra() analogy existing ylim argument limit w range plot. colours used plot functions can set setColours(). default line type solid can changed via setLinetypes() function. Use colour linetype plots irrespective number species.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Users can now replace lognormal function predation kernel function choice, allowing differently shaped kernel species. New box_pred_kernel() implements box-shaped kernel alternative default lognormal_pred_kernel(). New power_law_pred_kernel() implements power-law kernel sigmoidal cutoffs ends. suitable filter feeders. Users can sets predation kernel predator-size-dependent predator/prey mass ration (via setPredKernel()). Mizer automatically falls back old non-FFT code handle . (#41) New getPredKernel() returns full 3-dimensional predation kernel array, even stored MizerParams object.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Now finally possible several gears (fleets) targeting species. information set via new gear_params() data frame. See setFishing() details.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: now accessor functions slots MizerParams MizerSim objects. example get size grid spacing now use w(), w_full(), dw(), dw_full(). New upgradeParams() upgradeSim() can upgrade objects previous versions mizer work new version. New getDiet() calculates diet predators. (#43) Alternative functions RickerRDD() SheperdRDD() density-dependence reproduction, well noRDD() constantRDD(). New gear selectivity function double_sigmoid_length() allows modelling escape large individuals. New gear selectivity function sigmoidal_weight() weight-based trawl selectivity function. (Ken H Andersen) New getGrowthCurves() calculates growth curves (size age). New mizerRates() calculates rates needed model collects list. convenience function times() extract times simulation results saved MizerSim object. Convenience functions finalN(), finalNResource() finalNOther() well idxFinalT() access values final time simulation. New function getCriticalFeedingLevel() returns critical feeding level species size. Mizer re-exports melt() function reshape2 package allows users convert arrays returned mizer functions data frames can used example ggplot2 plotly. validSpeciesParams() checks validity species parameter data frame sets defaults missing required parameters.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: allometric exponents n, p q well feeding level f0 can now set species level via columns species_params. critical feeding level fc can now specified species parameter used calculate metabolic rate parameter ks supplied. project() now shows progress bar simulation running. Can turned progress_bar = FALSE argument. Satiation can switched setting maximum intake rate Inf. Users can now set resource dynamics instead default resource_semichemostat(). Different species can interact resource different strengths, feed resource , controlled interaction_resource column species parameter data frame. steepness maturity ogive can now controlled via w_mat25 column species parameter dataframe, gives size 25% individuals species mature. scaling exponent allocation energy reproduction can now set via m column species parameter data frame. project() can now continue projection last time step previous simulation first argument MizerSim object. new append argument controls whether new results appended old. Values minimum resource size, minimum maximum consumer sizes set automatically provided newMultispeciesParams(). Default values species parameters used missing values within column species parameter data frame, column missing entirely. Rate functions take defaults n, n_pp n_other arguments initial values params argument. New perfect_scaling argument allows newTraitParams() produce perfectly scale-invariant model. new ext_mort_prop argument newTraitParams() allows inclusion external mortality. Added data fileNS_params North Sea model MizerParams object. Comments can added MizerParams objects slots. Slots comments protected overwritten allometric defaults. Gear selectivity functions now can use species parameters.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Mizer now documentation website https://sizespectrum.org/mizer/ latest released version https://sizespectrum.org/mizer/dev/ development version. (#48) help pages mizer functions extended massively, see example help newMultispeciesParams(). vignette chapters shown pages website. html help pages plotting functions now show example plots. Clarified mizer uses grams years size time units agnostic whether abundances per area, per volume per study area. (#42) Added tutorial using ggplot2 plotly mizer. Added tutorial working git GitHub mizer development. Added FAQ page developers. Added unit test automatically run spell check documentation. getmM2() -> getPredMort() plotM2 -> plotPredMort() getM2background() -> getResourceMort() getZ() -> getMort() getESpawning() -> getERepro() MizerParams() -> emptyParams() set_multispecies_model() Renamed maximum reproductive rate r_max R_max. Updated list publications (@Kenhasteandersen) Using R Markdown roxygen comments.

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: getSSB(), calculation spawning stock biomass done correctly using maturity ogive instead proportion energy allocated reproduction. (#47) fast FFT method old method calculating integrals now give numerical results. (#39) getEncounter() getPredRate() now set names returned arrays. Resource carrying capacity scale-invariant model calculated way reduces rounding errors. Avoids potential problems negative numbers due numerical errors. Consistently cutting predation kernel 0 beta + 3 sigma. ylim argument handled correctly plots. display_frame() now exported. plotGrowthCurves() getGrowthCurves() also works single species t_start argument project() used correctly times truncated 3 significant figures, allow something like 2019. get_initial_n() gets values n q params object summary() MizerParams object reflects number non-empty resource bins. (@patricksykes)

title: mizer 2.0.0
text: Now using vdiffr package test plots. Converted S4 methods functions decrease learning curve new developers. calculation defaults now handled new get_gamma_default(), get_h_default() get_ks_default(), making easier change extend future. Helper function set_species_param_default() makes easier set default values species parameters. Simplified FFT calculations readable. Using @inherit functionality roxygen2 reduce duplication roxygen documentation. Using `@family’ group function documentation pages. helper functions now documented exported. getPhiPrey() replaced getEncounter() now returns full encounter rate, including contribution components. Even absence components, getEncounter() differs old getPhiPrey() includes search volume factor. Changed naming convention: user-facing function names now camelCase. Consistently use params refer argument class MizerParams, sim refer argument class MizerSim, object argument can either. Updated calls setClass() follow new guidelines, replacing representation class removing prototype validity. Added numerical tests. Using assert_that check arguments functions often. Argument shiny_progress renamed progress_bar control type progress bar. documentation renamed “background” “plankton” consistently “resource”. Using outer() instead tapply() possible improve readability. Avoiding use hasArg() anyNA() available R 3.1 robust code setting size grids. Improved consistency issue warnings issue messages. Split large code files smaller files. Merged @std_metab @activity slots single @metab slot. Moved @w_min_idx @species_params slot. Added slot @maturity hold maturity ogive. Added slot @pred_kernel hold predation kernel variable predator/prey ratio. Added slot @resource_dynamics allow user specify alternative resource dynamics. Added slot @gear_dynamics species targeted multiple gears. Added slot @ft_mask used calculating predation rates using Fourier transform method. Added slot @rates_funcs allow mizer extensions replace mizer rate functions rate functions. Instead function slot @srr now name function @rate_funcs$RDD, see #91. Added slots @other_dynamics, @other_params, @other_encounter, @other_mort @initial_n_other allow mizer extensions add ecosystem components.

title: mizer 1.0.1
text: CRAN release: 2019-01-27 Now compatible older versions R > 3.1.0. Skipping test CRAN fails machines different precision. Fixing minor typos documentation.

title: mizer 1.0
text: CRAN release: 2018-05-01 Fixed bugs start time simulation handled. leads small corrections, output version slightly different previous versions. Introduced scale-invariant trait-based model, set set_scaling_model(), see section 12 vignette. Added function adds news species scale-invariant background, computes approximately steady state close power law, see section 13 vignette. Created example shiny app allow people use mizer web browser without install mizer. app explores effect selective fishing gear case study. Added units axes Added function plotting growth curves PlotYield() longer fails species names numbers species abundance zero Added total parameter several plot functions add curve total community (sum species resource) Added species parameter plot functions allow selection species plotted Allow number ticks y-axis biomass plot controlled Allow size- species-dependent background death. Add @initial_n @initial_n_pp slots MizerParams class. Now checking effort times increasing. Corrections documentation. Improvements vignette. Add test numeric solution analytic solution.

title: mizer 0.4
text: CRAN release: 2017-12-14 Improvements made speed evaluating convolution sums via fft, removing bottlenecks getPhiPrey() getPredRate(). Using C++ inner loop project method extra speed. Minor corrections vignette documentation bring alignment document new home GitHub new maintainers.

title: mizer 0.3
text: Improvements made speed simulations. Remaining bottle necks sweep statements getPhiPrey() getPredRate(). Moved tests new suggested folder. Minor changes documentation pass new check requirements.

title: mizer 0.2
text: CRAN release: 2014-04-16 Release coincide submission MEE paper. major changes. Just minor bug fixes.

title: mizer 0.1
